data.title: Law of Clarity
data.description: Clear interface design that prevents confusion and user errors.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Design to reduce the complexity of choices, enhancing decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Prioritization of actions and shallow menu hierarchies.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Buttons are sized and positioned for easy access and interaction, especially on mobile.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Focused on limiting choices to prevent cognitive overload.
data.technical_spec: Use of chunks and categorization in UI elements.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Important information or actions are positioned for maximum visibility and recall.
data.technical_spec: Placement strategies in menus and notification areas.
